The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

items.title: CVE-2026-2629 | jishi node-sonos-http-api up to 3776f0ee2261c924c7b7204de121a38100a08ca7 TTS Provider mac-os.js Promise phrase os command injection (Issue 915)

The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the component Service Windows Service. Such manipulation leads to unquoted search path. This vulnerability is traded as CVE-2019-25308. An attack has to be approached locally. Furthermore, there is an exploit available.

items.title: CVE-2026-2345 | Proctorio Secure Exam Proctor Extension up to 1.5.25220.33 Incoming Message origin validation
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Proctorio Secure Exam Proctor Extension up to 1.5.25220.33 and classified as problematic. This impacts an unknown function of the component Incoming Message Handler. The manipulation results in origin validation error. This vulnerability is reported as CVE-2026-2345. items.title: CVE-2026-25868 | MiniGal Nano up to 0.3.5 index.php currentdir cross site scripting
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in MiniGal Nano up to 0.3.5. It has been rated as problematic. This impacts an unknown function of the file index.php. This manipulation of the argument currentdir causes cross site scripting. This vulnerability only affects products that are no longer supported by the maintainer. This vulnerability is handled as CVE-2026-25868. The attack can be initiated remotely. There is not any exploit available.
